rules.name: Reverse Split Squeeze - Breakout Pullback
rules.rule: Stock already broke $2.81 and hit $2.89 HOD today. Closed at $2.69 above VWAP ($2.34) and EMA9 ($2.50) - bullish structure intact. TWO SETUPS: (1) Break above $2.89 HOD, wait for pullback to confirm above $2.70 over VWAP. (2) Morning pullback to VWAP ($2.34) or EMA9 ($2.50) - enter if it bounces and reclaims $2.60. STOP: Below EMA34 ($2.17). No break no trade.
rules.notes: 100-for-1 reverse split catalyst. ADX 38 strong trend, RSI 62 not yet overbought. EMA9 $2.50, VWAP $2.34, EMA34 $2.17. Stop below $2.17. Massive range to $4-$4.70 if breakout holds.

rules.name: Multi-Day Squeeze - Two Entry Setups
rules.rule: Ran 400%+ from $0.38 to $2.00 HOD. After-hours pullback to $1.63-1.65 near EMA9 ($1.66). ADX 43 very strong trend but RSI 75 overbought - expect morning pullback. TWO SETUPS: (1) Pullback to VWAP ($1.44) or EMA9 ($1.66) with higher lows forming - enter on VWAP reclaim or EMA9 bounce. (2) Breakout above $2.00 after consolidation - pullback confirms above $1.95 over VWAP. STOP: Below EMA34 ($1.33). CAUTION: RSI overbought, may need to cool off first. No confirmation = no trade.
rules.notes: EMA9 $1.66, VWAP $1.44, EMA34 $1.33, EMA200 $0.81. After-hours at $1.63-1.65 (testing EMA9). RSI 75 overbought - morning dip likely. Watch for higher lows off VWAP. Daily 50 EMA target at $3. Stop below EMA34 $1.33.
